summary: Tests cover core validator logic (classifySecret, validateSecrets, renderReport) reasonably well but have critical gaps: (1) CLI (cli.ts) is untested—no argument parsing, exit codes (0/1/2), or error handling tests; (2) fixture files referenced in tests don't exist (fixtures/valid.json, all-ok.json, warning-only.json, malformed.json, missing-field.json), making loadConfig tests non-runnable; (3) field-type validation in loadConfig (rejecting non-string names, non-number rotationPolicyDays) is not tested despite being implemented; (4) missing edge cases—exact warningDays boundary, empty arrays, single-secret cases, tie-breaking within groups, non-integer rotationPolicyDays; (5) workflow.test.ts depends on undefined npm package 'yaml' and assumes act/Docker work perfectly without verifying prerequisites; (6) no integration tests combining CLI + validator. The test suite would miss ~40% of realistic failures (malformed inputs, type errors, CLI misuse). Requires fixture files to be created and CLI tests added before relying on this suite.
